title: Prima Kitchenware 18163c Kitchen Scale | Mechanical Operation | Compact with Clear Removable Bowl | Weigh up to 5kg | Deep 1.2L Capacity Bowl | Imperial & Metric Measurements | Zero Adjustment | White
features: Mechanical Operation: No batteries needed—this kitchen scale operates mechanically for reliable and precise measurements every time.
Compact Design: Space-saving size fits easily in any kitchen, making it a convenient addition to your cooking tools.
Clear Removable Bowl: The 1.2L bowl is transparent and removable for easy filling and cleaning, enhancing your measuring experience.
High Capacity: Weighs up to 5kg, accommodating a wide range of ingredients, from baking essentials to meal prep.
Dual Measurement Options: Easily switch between imperial and metric measurements, ensuring versatility for any recipe.
Zero Adjustment Feature: Reset the scale to zero with a simple turn, allowing for easy tare functionality and accurate measurements.
description: Elevate your cooking and baking with the Prima Kitchenware 18163C Kitchen Scale! This mechanical scale combines precision and convenience, featuring a clear removable bowl that holds up to 1.2L. Weighing ingredients has never been easier, with a capacity of up to 5kg and the flexibility to measure in both imperial and metric units. Its compact design makes it perfect for any kitchen size, while the zero adjustment feature ensures accurate measurements every time. Say goodbye to guesswork and embrace precise cooking with this stylish white kitchen scale, a must-have for any culinary enthusiast.
